project_identity.project_brief: A K-12 AI chat platform with third-party app integration, built on a Chatbox fork, enabling educational apps to live inside the chat experience with teacher governance and child safety.
project_identity.business_context: TutorMeAI must evolve from chatbot to platform. 12-18 month window. No competitor combines K-12 governance + extensibility. K-12 AI market $539.7M (2025) → $13.6B (2035).

project_archetypes.justification: Core thesis is third-party app integration. FR-APP-001–008 define registration, invocation, rendering, lifecycle. FR-STATE-001–006 define CBP protocol. MCP-compatible tool definitions. The integration contract IS the product.

Sub-100ms requirements: 100ms WebSocket relay (NFR-PERF-004), 200ms typing indicator (NFR-PERF-003). WebSocket for chat streaming, Mission Control, collaborative sessions. Redis Pub/Sub for cross-worker relay.
COPPA 2025 (April 22, 2026 deadline), FERPA, WCAG 2.1 AA are architectural constraints. FR-COMP-001–004, FR-SAFE-001–008, FR-AUTH-004 define compliance architecture.
Server-authoritative event sourcing for collaborative sessions. Safety alerts trigger teacher notifications. App lifecycle transitions cascade. District-wide suspension cascades.
Multiple lifecycle state machines: app instance (loading→active→suspended→collapsed→terminated→error), COPPA consent flow, app review pipeline, conversation lifecycle.

language.justification: Monoglot stack — Chatbox frontend is TypeScript, shared Zod schemas between frontend and backend eliminate type drift. TECH-CLRFY-001 decision.

primary_framework.required: Chatbox (Electron + React + Vite) for frontend, Fastify for backend
primary_framework.justification: Chatbox fork is the build base (customer decision). Fastify chosen for auto-OpenAPI, schema validation, performance (TECH-CLRFY-001).

secondary_frameworks.justification: Already in Chatbox codebase. Same SDK frontend and backend.
Type-safe queries, best TS ORM ecosystem. Supports RLS via raw SQL.
Already in Chatbox. Shared between frontend and backend.
Standard Node.js LTI library for Canvas/Schoology integration.
Best Node.js Redis client. Cluster support, auto-reconnect.

database_technology.justification: RLS for multi-tenant isolation (FERPA). Mature, reliable. Customer chose Railway managed Postgres.

prohibited_technologies.reason: Cannot support RLS, concurrent WebSocket writes, or multi-tenant isolation
No native row-level security for FERPA compliance

deployment_constraints.justification: Customer decision. Managed Postgres, Redis, containers. Git-based CI/CD.
deployment_constraints.data_residency_requirement: US only — all student data, LLM traces, app states on US infrastructure

compliance_constraints.justification: Platform serves children under 13. Compliance deadline April 22, 2026.
architectural_implications: Parental consent gate before under-13 access
PII detection and stripping at every boundary
Separate consent for third-party app data disclosure
Data deletion within 30 days on request
Audit trails for all record access

integration_constraints.justification: Core AI — product doesn't function without it

throughput_sla.justification: Not explicitly specified. Derived from scale: 30 students × 100 classrooms = 3,000 concurrent users.

data_freshness.justification: WebSocket streaming for chat, Mission Control, collaborative sessions.

in_scope_features: Third-party apps via CBP (Chess, Spotify, Weather)

integration_boundaries.purpose: Chat, classification, tool routing, state analysis

integration_boundaries.failure_mode_requirement: FR-WTHR: Return cached data with staleness
FR-AUTH-001: Fallback to platform JWT login
FR-INFRA-001: Degrade to direct DB, disable real-time

recommended_language.justification: Monoglot stack. Chatbox is TS. Shared Zod schemas. Vercel AI SDK is TS-native. MCP SDK is TS-primary.

alternatives_considered.why_not_chosen: Polyglot stack, no shared types, separate AI SDK, language boundary overhead

recommended_primary_framework.justification: Auto-OpenAPI (L-001), built-in schema validation, 2-3x faster than Express, native TypeScript.

alternatives_considered.why_not_chosen: No built-in validation or OpenAPI. Slower.

recommended_database.justification: RLS for FERPA multi-tenant isolation. Mature, reliable. Railway managed.

recommended_deployment_platform.justification: Customer decision. Simple PaaS, managed services, git-based CI/CD.
recommended_deployment_platform.configuration_approach: Container services for backend/frontend, managed Postgres + Redis, separate Langfuse service

critical_technology_decisions.decision: Prisma ORM with raw SQL for RLS policies
critical_technology_decisions.rationale: Prisma doesn't natively support SET LOCAL. Use $executeRaw in transaction middleware for tenant context.

critical_technology_decisions.decision: Single Claude Sonnet model for all tasks
critical_technology_decisions.rationale: Customer chose simplicity over multi-model routing. Sonnet handles chat, classification, and reasoning.

cons: Higher cost than Haiku for classification
May be slower than Opus for complex reasoning

critical_technology_decisions.rationale: Chatbox already uses pnpm. Shared Zod schemas package between frontend and backend.

technical_risks.risk: Prisma SET LOCAL for RLS requires raw SQL middleware
technical_risks.mitigation: Well-documented pattern. Test with cross-tenant query assertions.

technical_risks.risk: Electron iframe security — 70% of Electron apps disable sandbox
technical_risks.mitigation: Enforce sandbox in Electron config. CSP headers. Security audit.
Minimize core changes. Plugin system as separate layer.

technical_risks.risk: Node.js single-threaded for CPU-bound safety pipeline
technical_risks.mitigation: Safety stages 1/2/4 are regex (fast). Stage 3 is API call (async). No CPU bottleneck.
Ship fast. Differentiate on safety depth + teacher governance.

technology_maturity_risks.mitigation: Mature enough for all needs. Express middleware wrappable via plugin.

technology_maturity_risks.risk: Recent major version with breaking changes
technology_maturity_risks.mitigation: Use Chatbox's existing version. Don't upgrade unless needed.
LTI 1.3 spec is stable. Library covers full Advantage spec.
